templates.name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Mutual NDA — covers mutual confidentiality obligations between two parties sharing proprietary information.

templates.name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
templates.description: Signature and cover sheet to accompany the Common Paper Mutual NDA, capturing party details and effective date.

templates.name: Cloud Service Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Cloud Service Agreement — governs SaaS/cloud service subscriptions including acceptable use, support, and data handling.

templates.name: Design Partner Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Design Partner Agreement — structures early-access product testing relationships with feedback obligations and IP protections.

templates.name: Service Level Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper Service Level Agreement — defines uptime commitments, incident response procedures, and service credit remedies.

templates.name: Professional Services Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Professional Services Agreement — covers statement-of-work engagements, deliverables, IP ownership, and payment terms.

templates.name: Data Processing Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper Data Processing Agreement — addresses GDPR/CCPA compliance, data subject rights, sub-processor obligations, and security measures.

templates.name: Software License Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Software License Agreement — grants end-user rights to on-premise or downloadable software with support and maintenance terms.

templates.name: Partnership Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Partnership Agreement — structures reseller, referral, or technology-partner relationships including revenue share and joint marketing.

templates.name: Pilot Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Pilot Agreement — governs time-limited product trials with evaluation criteria, data rights, and conversion terms.

templates.name: Business Associate Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Business Associate Agreement — satisfies HIPAA BAA requirements for vendors handling protected health information.

templates.name: AI Addendum
templates.description: Common Paper Standard AI Addendum — supplemental terms for AI-powered products covering model use restrictions, output ownership, and prohibited uses.
